data.body: 522 MERGED (8a9bb4308) — gate fix on main. Main synced, .venv repointed back to /Users/joeoakhart/rebar (main checkout has the carve-out). Bug d789 CLOSED. Open follow-ons: (i) final targeted plan-review round on S2/S4/S5 residual — fix the (b)-introduced inconsistencies (stale 'autolander-bot vote ACL' cross-ref, S4->S5 heartbeat dep, CONTRIBUTING §FFO), remove the S4->ADR-0042 downstream forward-ref, disambiguate submittable(REST-field) vs FFO-landable, list S5 existing-file edit targets; decline over-spec. (ii) auto-lander epic f1fa Phase-1 (S1-S6) is decomposed + plan-reviewed + signed, ready to implement via /rebar-implement when desired. (iii) bug b228 (perf-test flake) open.
